resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report labels knee arthritis as Moderate (53%), hip arthritis as Slightly Increased (26%), and wrist arthritis as Normal (30%), with normal generic lifetime-risk comparators displayed for each joint.

conditionBoundaryContext.plainEnglishMeaning: Arthritis Prevention is currently a boundary report: it can document what evidence is available, what is missing, and what a related Sequencing.com arthritis sample section looks like, but it cannot diagnose arthritis, estimate disease risk, infer joint status, interpret labs, or make health decisions.
